Hochul backs first-ever pied-à-terre tax in NY state history

✅ Sliding scale — rates climb at $15M and $25M thresholds 
✅ Est. ~$500M/year in new revenue 

⚠️ Exact rates TBD — state budget still in talks ——————————————— 
NYC deficit: $5.4B
